mapper.select: select a.pur_date ,a.seq ,dbo.getCustomerName(a.customer_cd) as customer_name ,a.customer_cd ,a.area_cd ,a.storage_cd ,dbo.getStorageName(a.storage_cd) as storageName ,a.remark ,a.manager_id ,a.vat_type ,a.order_type ,dbo.getUserName(a.manager_id) as manager_name ,a.pur_id from tb_pur_mst a where a.pur_id = #{purId}

select a.item_cd ,a.item_name ,a.item_type_cd ,a.spec ,a.qty ,a.in_price ,a.supply_price ,a.vat_price ,a.lot_No ,a.expiry_date ,a.test_no ,a.etc ,a.pur_id ,a.pur_item_id ,a.pur_order_item_id ,b.tran_item_id ,b.tran_id from tb_pur_item a left outer join tb_inv_tran_item b on b.pur_item_id = a.pur_item_id where a.pur_id = #{purId}
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(test_no, 3) AS INT)), 0) + 1 FROM tb_item_test_no WHERE test_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
